sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n98911" key="sumfilomaqe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">συμφῐλο-μᾰθέω</orth>, <sense id="n98911.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">join in love of knowledge</tr_>, <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0069.tlg001:23" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Dion.Calliph.</author> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">23</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
